title: Fix print layout (hide nav header) and ensure cross-device bill sync

requirements.text: Add CSS `@media print` rules to the global stylesheet (frontend/src/index.css) that hide the navigation header (the sticky nav bar containing the MI logo, MANISH INFRATECH text, navigation links, and logout button) and all other screen-only UI elements (page action buttons, sidebars, breadcrumbs, filter controls) during printing. Only the invoice content rendered by InvoicePrintView must appear on the printed page: the company header with MI logo, MANISH INFRATECH name, party name, party GST number, invoice number, bill date, line items table, and GST summary section. No website chrome must appear on any printed page.

quotes: WHY HEADER IS PRINTED WITH THE INVOICE IT IS NOT PROFESSION IN PRINTING ONLY COMPANY NAME LOGO AND OTHER COMPANY NAME AND GST AND THEN AMOUNT NOT THE HEADER
when printed only name of MANISHINFRATECH and it's logo and buyer companies name and their gst and then amount+cgst+sgst
hide the navigation header (navy bar with MI logo, MANISH INFRATECH text, nav links, logout button) and all screen-only UI elements

acceptanceCriteria: When window.print() is triggered from the InvoicePrintPage, the navigation header bar (navy background, MI logo, nav links, logout button) does NOT appear on the printed output.

The printed invoice shows only: MI logo, MANISH INFRATECH company name, buyer's party name, party GST number (if available), invoice number, bill date, line items table, and GST summary (Base Amount, CGST, SGST, Round-off, Final Amount, amount in words).
Action buttons (Print, Back, Edit, Delete) and filter controls do not appear on the printed page.
The `@media print` CSS rules apply globally so that any page that triggers print hides the nav header.
The invoice content prints cleanly without extra whitespace or broken layout caused by hidden elements.

requirements.text: Audit and fix the backend canister actor initialization in `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts` to ensure the ICP backend canister actor is created using the anonymous identity, instantiated once, cached, and reused across all sessions. Verify that the Candid/IDL interface declared in the frontend actor factory exactly matches all current backend method signatures in `backend/main.mo` (addBill, editBill, deleteBill, getAllBills, searchBills, getPartySummaryByDateRange, getCompanyReport, getProfitLossSummary, savePartyGstNumber, getPartyGstNumber, getUniquePartyNames, getUniqueProductNames). Fix any method signature mismatch, stale import, or race condition that causes the actor to be undefined or fail to connect, so that bills created on one device are visible on all other devices via the shared stable canister storage.

quotes: Yes I want that only that the bill have to sync in all device

Bill sync across all devices — ensure bills stored in the canister's stable storage are accessible from any device (fixing any actor connection or caching issues that cause different devices to see different data).

acceptanceCriteria: Bills added on Device A appear when the app is loaded on Device B without requiring any manual refresh or cache clearing.
The actor is created with anonymous identity (no Internet Identity dependency).
The actor instance is cached and reused — not recreated on every render or hook call.
All backend method calls (getAllBills, addBill, editBill, deleteBill, searchBills, and report methods) resolve without 'actor not available' errors.
The IDL/Candid interface declared in the frontend exactly matches the backend method signatures (argument types, return types, variant labels).
While the actor is initializing, a loading spinner is shown on data-dependent pages. If initialization fails, the message 'Unable to connect to server. Please refresh and try again.' is displayed.

requirements.text: Confirm that the backend `backend/main.mo` actor uses stable variables for the bills map and partyProfiles map, and that `preupgrade` and `postupgrade` system hooks correctly serialize and deserialize all stable state. Bills must be globally accessible from any device via the shared canister stable storage and must survive every canister upgrade and redeployment without data loss.

quotes: the bill have to sync in all device
Bills stored in the canister's stable storage are correctly fetched and accessible from any device

acceptanceCriteria: All bill data and party profiles are stored in stable variables in main.mo.
preupgrade and postupgrade hooks are present and correctly serialize/deserialize the bills map and partyProfiles map.
After a canister upgrade, all previously saved bills remain accessible via getAllBills.
Bills are stored in a single global map (not per-principal), so any authenticated frontend session can read all bills regardless of which device created them.

constraints: Do not change any structural content of InvoicePrintView (line item columns, GST summary rows, company header, footer).
Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
The hardcoded credentials (MANISHINFRATECH / 1752) and localStorage session logic must remain unchanged.
No new backend methods should be added — only verify and fix existing ones.
nonGoals: Redesigning the invoice print layout or changing the red-and-white color theme.
Adding new invoice fields or columns.
Modifying navigation link structure or adding new pages.
